description: CompositionDark grey round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo printed at the back of the neck, collection logo printed on left sleeve and bold lettering on the front in graphic print with metallic accentsFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Pay tribute to Usain Bolt in this dark grey t-shirt from puma. Salute the Jamaican sprinter and Olympic champion as you chill out in this smart tee. And just as the tee asks “How fast is too fast”, show the world the meaning of speed! Pair it with jeans or shorts for a great look. Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
